definition:
1. courage, to undertake  or venture  a thing, boldness, daring, hardihood, courage , (Pindar), attic; τῶνδε τόλμαν σχεθεῖν to have courage  for this business, (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
2. in bad sense, over-boldness, recklessness , Lat. audacia, [variant datesTragica Adespota, etc. 
3. a bold  or daring act , [variant datesTragica Adespota 
 (ML)
